metadata.name: Pain-Evolution-Chain - Complete Flow
metadata.description: End-to-end test of complete chain: Pain Detection → Trust Update → Evolution Queue → Diagnostic Trigger. Verifies self-healing loop.
metadata.author: Claude Code
metadata.first_principles: Self-evolution capability depends on pain detection accuracy and evolution triggering. Without this loop, Agent cannot self-improve.

steps.name: Verify EvolutionWorker is Running
steps.description: Check that EvolutionWorker background service is active
steps.task: Check the process list for evolution-worker or openclaw-plugin services. Report which services are running.

steps.name: Initialize Clean State
steps.description: Remove existing pain flag and evolution queue to start clean

steps.name: Record Initial Trust State
steps.description: Get baseline trust score before inducing pain

steps.name: Induce Tool Failure (Non-Risky)
steps.description: Execute a failing task on safe path to generate pain signal with base score 30
steps.task: Attempt to delete a file that doesn't exist: /tmp/non-existent-tool-failure-xyz-123.txt

steps.name: Verify Pain Signal Generated - Tool Failure
steps.description: Verify pain signal was created with score=30 (base), source='tool_failure'

steps.name: Verify Trust Penalty Applied
steps.description: Verify trust score decreased by -8 for tool failure

steps.name: Verify Pain Event Logged
steps.description: Verify pain signal was recorded in events.jsonl

steps.name: Induce Risky Path Failure
steps.description: Execute a failing task on risk path to generate pain signal with score 50 (base 30 + risk 20)
steps.task: Attempt to modify PLAN.md without proper permissions: append 'UNAUTHORIZED MODIFICATION' to /home/csuzngjh/clawd/docs/PLAN.md

steps.name: Verify Pain Signal Score - Risky Failure
steps.description: Verify pain signal has score=50 (30 base + 20 risk bonus)

steps.name: Verify Trust Penalty - Risky Failure
steps.description: Verify trust score decreased by -15 for risky failure

steps.name: Wait for EvolutionWorker Scan
steps.description: Wait for EvolutionWorker to scan pain_flag (polls every 15 min, but we check after 30s for initial scan)
steps.reason: EvolutionWorker has initial 5s delay, then 15min interval. We wait to see if it processed pain_flag.

steps.name: Check Evolution Queue Processing
steps.description: Verify pain signals were queued in evolution_queue.json (score ≥ 30 threshold)

steps.name: Verify High-Score Signals Queued
steps.description: Verify only signals with score ≥ 30 were queued (filtering threshold)

steps.name: Check Pain Flag Status Update
steps.description: Verify queued pain signals have 'status: queued' appended

steps.name: Verify Evolution Directive Generated
steps.description: Verify EVOLUTION_DIRECTIVE.json was created with active task

steps.name: Verify Directive Priority (Highest Score First)
steps.description: Verify directive processes highest-score pain signal first

steps.name: Verify Evolution Event Logged
steps.description: Verify evolution_task event was recorded in events.jsonl

steps.name: Verify Complete Chain Traceability
steps.description: Verify complete event chain: failure → pain → trust_change → queue → directive

steps.name: Test Low-Score Pain Signal Filtering
steps.description: Create a low-score pain signal (<30) to verify it's NOT queued
steps.task:
Manually create a low-score pain signal by writing to /home/csuzngjh/clawd/workspace/code/principles/docs/.pain_flag with: 'score: 20
source: test
reason: Low score test
is_risky: false'

steps.name: Wait and Verify Low-Score Not Queued
steps.description: Wait for EvolutionWorker scan
steps.reason: Allow time for EvolutionWorker to process low-score signal

steps.name: Verify Low-Score Signal Ignored
steps.description: Verify signal with score 20 was NOT queued (below 30 threshold)

steps.name: Test Pain Signal Deduplication
steps.description: Write same pain signal again to verify it's not duplicated in queue
steps.task:
Append to /home/csuzngjh/clawd/workspace/code/principles/docs/.pain_flag: '
score: 50
source: test_dedup
reason: Test deduplication
is_risky: false'

steps.name: Verify No Duplicate in Queue
steps.description: Verify identical pain signal is not duplicated (status: queued prevents re-queue)

steps.name: Cleanup Test Artifacts
steps.description: Remove all test-generated files

step1_pain_detection.process: Detect failure → Calculate score (30 base + 20 risk)

step3_evolution_queue.process: EvolutionWorker scans → Checks threshold → Adds to queue

step4_directive_generation.process: Sort by score → Create directive → Mark as in_progress

notes: Pain Detection correctly identifies tool failures
Pain Score calculation is accurate (30 base, +20 for risky)
Trust Engine applies correct penalties (-8 tool, -15 risky)
Score threshold (≥30) filters out low-priority signals
High-score signals are processed first (priority queue)
Duplicate signals are prevented (status: queued check)
Complete event chain is traceable in logs
